name: auto-roles
description: Automatically assign roles on join, or let users pick roles via reaction/button menus. Use when asked for auto-role, self-assign roles, reaction roles, or role menu.
author: adraalabs

name: birthday
description: Birthday tracking with announcements on the special day. Use when asked for birthday system, birthday reminders, or birthday roles.
author: adraalabs

name: economy
description: Coins economy with balance, pay, daily rewards, and leaderboard. Use when asked for economy, coins, currency, or money system.
author: adraalabs

name: giveaway
description: Timed giveaways with reaction entries, live entry count, and winner selection. Use when asked to set up a giveaway, raffle, or prize drawing.
author: adraalabs

name: invite-tracker
description: Track who invited whom, invite counts, and invite leaderboard. Use when asked for invite tracking, invite rewards, or who invited a member.
author: adraalabs

name: leveling
description: XP per message, levels, rank cards with image, and leaderboard. Use when asked for leveling, XP, ranking, or experience system.
author: adraalabs

name: polls
description: Custom polls with buttons, live vote counts, and duplicate vote prevention. Use when asked for polls, voting, or surveys.
author: adraalabs

name: starboard
description: Pin popular messages to a starboard channel when they reach a reaction threshold. Use when asked for starboard, best-of, or highlight channel.
author: adraalabs

name: ticket-system
description: Support ticket system with private channels, modal forms, and close button. Use when asked for tickets, support system, or help desk.
author: adraalabs

name: welcome
description: Welcome messages for new members with auto-role and goodbye messages. Use when asked for welcome system, greet new members, or member join messages.
author: adraalabs
